description: A finance-master record representing a project or cost-center the spend is charged to. A requisition line is chargedTo a project/cost-center; the project links to a Budget per period that the soft check (at requisition) and hard commit (at PO) test against. Only ACTIVE projects are selectable on a new requisition. Maintainable individually or by bulk import (natural-key upsert by code).

fields.name: code
fields.label: Project / Cost Center Code
fields.validation: non-blank; uppercase; natural primary key; unique; immutable; the bulk-import upsert key
fields.purpose: The stable code a requisition/line references as its cost charge and the natural key bulk import upserts on; ties the spend to the budget it draws down end to end.

fields.name: name
fields.label: Project / Cost Center Name
fields.validation: non-blank; the display field for the reference dropdown and the entity normalizer (project -> name)
fields.purpose: The human-readable label shown in the Project/Cost Center dropdown and resolved by the normalizer (RA e09 project -> name) so requisitions display the charged project by name.

fields.name: type
fields.label: Type
fields.validation: one of the set; distinguishes a time-boxed project from a standing cost-center
fields.purpose: Separates time-boxed projects from standing cost-centers so budget-period semantics and spend rollups treat each correctly (a project may close, a cost-center recurs).

fields.name: status
fields.label: Status
fields.validation: default ACTIVE; only ACTIVE projects/cost-centers are selectable on a new requisition; INACTIVE not selectable
fields.purpose: Gates whether the project can be charged on a new requisition; an admin retires a closed project to INACTIVE so it disappears from intake without deleting its historical spend.

fields.name: budgetId
fields.label: Linked Budget
fields.validation: the current-period budget funded for this project/cost-center; resolved per period
fields.purpose: Links the project to the funded budget the soft check (at requisition) and hard commit (at PO) test against (axiom A4); the join that turns a cost charge into a budget control.

fields.name: managerId
fields.label: Budget Owner
fields.validation: the user who owns the project/cost-center budget; receives over-budget warnings and approves overrides
fields.purpose: The Budget Owner accountable for this cost-center; the recipient of the over-budget warning and the approver who logs a budget override (axiom A4), and the scope for cost-center spend analytics.

invariants: A4 budget soft-checked at requisition, hard-committed at PO against this project's budget; over-budget needs a logged override
A13 audit + SSE on every committed master change
only ACTIVE projects selectable on new requisitions
